name: Concert workflows
description: Ready-to-use Workflows used in Concert Workflows

tagDefinitions.name: Team
tagDefinitions.description: Workflows that are best suited for a respective department in your organization.

values.name: Security
values.description: Stay ahead of threats by ensuring that automated security provisions are enabled. Rely on our flows to secure your network.

values.name: Networking
values.description: Solve complex network orchestration issues and optimize performance by enabling the flows in this section.

values.name: Compute
values.description: Provision complex Compute-related tasks by leveraging our flows library. Explore our solutions in this category.

values.name: DevOps
values.description: Resolve complex issues and automate tedious DevOps tasks by using our specialized flows. This category explores commonly used scenarios.

values.name: IBM Concert
values.description: Flows for IBM Concert data ingestion and automated action.

tagDefinitions.name: Use case
tagDefinitions.description: Filter workflows that are best suited for a specific use case.

values.name: Resource Creation
values.description: Explore flows that allow you to easily create various resources with only a few clicks. These flows save precious time when setting up dedicated assets across different use cases.

values.name: CI/CD
values.description: These flows assist DevOps when performing routine CI/CD procedures. Commonly used scenarios are readily available!

values.name: Network Management
values.description: Take full control of your network by automating common tasks. Provision complex automations to optimize network performance.

values.name: Compute Management
values.description: Our flows give you the ability to rest assured that mundane computer management tasks will be taken care of! Explore this section to discover our top selection.

values.name: Cost Management
values.description: Leverage the power of Pliant's integrations and automation capabilities to reduce costs and plan your budget, run complex operations and align your financial goals.

values.name: Example
values.description: Flows to illustrate different structures and operations you may want to use in your own flows.

values.name: System Testing
values.description: Pre-built tests for various systems and technologies.

values.name: Observability
values.description: Gather data from all kinds of different systems and report on it or store it where you need it.
